result.markdown:
# Toxicokinetics of Imidacloprid ## Results of the experiment ### Data importation Notations : - `Date_start` : Start of the experiement (t0) - `Molecule` : Substance to which the earthworm is exposed - `Dose` : Exposure dose (mg/kg) - `ID_recipient` : Recipient in which the soil was prepared - `ID_camp` : ID of the earthworm campagne and generation (see XXX for more information) - `ID` : ID of the earthworm - `Nb_rep` : Identification number of the replicate - `Time_point` : Time point to which the earthworm is dedicated - `Phase` : Uptake or Elimination phase - `Time_introduction_D0` : Time of the day when the earthworm was introduced into his contaminated cosm - `w0` : Body weight at t0 - `w_Tp` : Body weight at the given time point - `w_frozen` : Body weight before congelation - `C_worm` : Measured concentration of the substance in the earthworm - `C_soil` : Measured concentration of the substance in the soil at the given time point ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} Levels_time_points <- c(as.character(seq(1,3,1)), "3b", as.character(seq(4,7,1)), "7b", as.character(seq(8,14,1)), "14b", as.character(seq(15,42,1))) df_TK_IMD <- f_read_data_TK("IMD") %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ na_if(.x, -1))) df_TK_IMD <- df_TK_IMD |> mutate( Time = t, CiEPX = C_worm_EPX, CiIMD = C_worm_IMD, Weight = Weight_nog, Time_point_f = as.factor(Time_point) ) |> dplyr::select(Time, CiEPX, CiIMD, Weight, w, Molecule, ID, expo, Time_point_f, Nb_rep, Experiment) |> mutate( CiEPX = na_if(CiEPX, -1), CiIMD = na_if(CiIMD, -1) )|> mutate( Time_point_f = fct_relevel(Time_point_f, Levels_time_points) ) df_TK_IMD_mean <- df_TK_IMD |> dplyr::select(-ID) |> group_by(Time) |> summarise( CiEPX = exp(mean(log(CiEPX[CiEPX > 0]), na.rm = TRUE)), CiIMD = exp(mean(log(CiIMD[CiIMD > 0]), na.rm = TRUE)), Weight = mean(Weight, na.rm = TRUE), w = mean(w, na.rm = TRUE), expo = mean(expo), .groups = "drop" ) |> mutate(Molecule = "IMD") ``` ::: ### Initial state ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # Weights at t=0 plot_D0 <- ggplot( data=subset(df_TK_IMD, Time==0), aes( x=Time_point_f, y=w, color=Molecule, fill=Molecule ) )+ geom_boxplot(alpha=0.2)+ geom_dotplot( binaxis='y', stackdir='center', dotsize=0.7, alpha=0.7 )+ facet_wrap(~Molecule+Experiment, ncol=2, scales="free_x")+ scale_color_manual(values=col_Molecule)+ scale_fill_manual(values=col_Molecule)+ labs(x="Dose (mg/kg)", y="Weight (mg)")+ theme_classic(14)+ theme( legend.position = "none", legend.title=element_text(size=sizetitle-2,face="bold"), legend.text = element_text(size=sizetitle-2,face="plain"), title=element_text(size=sizetitle, face="bold"), axis.title.x = element_blank(), axis.title.y = element_text(size=sizetitle,face="plain"), axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.line.x=element_blank(), axis.ticks.x=element_blank(), strip.background = element_rect( color="black", #fill=Nord_snow[3], size=0, linetype="solid" ), strip.text = element_text(face = "bold") ) plot_D0 ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Initial weights (with gut content) of earthworms.](BA_TK_IMD_files/figure-html/fig-init-1.png){#fig-init width=768} ::: ::: ### Growth curves Time points with a "b" corresponds to the experiment TK BIS where earthworms were massaged instead of fasting for a day. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[2], Nord_aurora[3], Nord_aurora[4]) ID_tri <- c(c(1, 9, 17, 25, 33, 41, 49, 57, 65, 73, 81, 89, 97, 107, 115, 123)+4, 140, 143,146) df_TK_IMD_plot <- df_TK_IMD |> filter(!is.na(Weight)) y_segment <- 1.5 df_phases <- df_TK_IMD |> filter(ID %in% ID_tri)|> arrange(Time_point_f, Time) |> group_by(Time_point_f) |> mutate( row = row_number(), t_start = Time, t_end = lead(Time), segment = row, y = y_segment ) |> filter(!is.na(t_end)) |> dplyr::select(Time_point_f, segment, t_start, t_end, y, Experiment) |> ungroup() |> mutate( Time_point = as.numeric(as.character(Time_point_f)), Phase = case_when( (segment == 1 & Time_point <= 21) ~ 1, (segment == 2 & Time_point <= 21) ~ 3, (segment == 1 & Time_point > 21) ~ 1, (segment == 2 & Time_point > 21) ~ 2, (segment == 3 & Time_point > 21) ~ 3, (Experiment == "TKBIS" & segment == 1)~1, (Experiment == "TKBIS" & segment == 2)~3 ) ) |> mutate( Time_point_f = fct_relevel(Time_point_f, Levels_time_points) ) p_IMD <- ggplot() + geom_segment( data = df_phases, aes( x = t_start, xend = t_end, y = y, yend = y, color = factor(Phase) ), linewidth = 2, alpha = 0.7 ) + geom_line( data = df_TK_IMD_plot, aes( x = Time, y = w, group = ID ), alpha=1, color = col_IMD, linetype = "dashed" ) + geom_point( data = df_TK_IMD, aes( x = Time, y = w, group = ID ), alpha=0.5, color = col_IMD ) + facet_wrap(~Time_point_f)+ labs( title = "Growth Curves", x = "Time (days)", y = "Weight", color = "" ) + scale_color_manual( values = col_exposure, label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"), name = "Phase" )+ theme_minimal(base_size = 12) + # Thème minimaliste theme( plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"), legend.position = "top", strip.background = element_rect( color="black", fill=Nord_snow[3], size=0, linetype="solid" ), strip.text = element_text(face = "bold") ) p_IMD ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Evolution of earthworms body weight before and after fasting](BA_TK_IMD_files/figure-html/fig-fasting-1.png){#fig-fasting width=768} ::: ::: ### Measured internal concentrations ::: {.cell fig-label='fig-curvesmooth'} ```{.r .cell-code} p <- ggplot( data = df_TK_IMD, aes( x = Time ) )+ geom_point( mapping = aes( y = CiIMD, color = Experiment, fill = Experiment ) )+ facet_wrap(~Molecule, ncol = 2, scales = "free")+ scale_color_manual(values = c(col_IMD, Nord_aurora[4]))+ scale_fill_manual(values = c(col_IMD, Nord_aurora[4]))+ labs( x = "Time (days)", y = "Concentration in earthworm (ng/g)" )+ # lims(x=c(13,16))+ theme_minimal() p ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Measurements of IMD concentration in earthworms exposed to 10 mg/kg of IMD and related weight measurement of earthworms. Points represent the experimental data, the blue curve and the transparent blue band are produced with geom_smooth.](BA_TK_IMD_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-2-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: ## Modeling of the toxicokinetics ### In files creation for MCMC Creation of the MCSim `.in` files : ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} show ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` standardGeneric for "show" defined from package "methods" function (object) standardGeneric("show") Methods may be defined for arguments: object Use showMethods(show) for currently available ones. (This generic function excludes non-simple inheritance; see ?setIs) ``` ::: ::: Model fit on data : ::: {.cell execute='false'} ```{.bash .cell-code} pwd cd .. cd .. cd mod/TK_IMD pwd makemcsim m_TK_IMD.model & for j in $(seq 1 3); do ./mcsim.m_TK_IMD TK_IMD_C${j}.in done ``` ::: The first step is to retrieve the information of the MCMC simulation experiments. The inputs : - Input files must a name like "xxxxx.1.in" - Output files must a name like "xxxxx.1.out" ### Get MCMC results ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} path_mod_IMD <- here::here("mod/TK_IMD") MCMC_out_IMD <- f_MCSim_ind(path_mod_IMD) NC <- MCMC_out_IMD$NC Nb_param <- MCMC_out_IMD$Nb_param Nb_experiment <- MCMC_out_IMD$Nb_experiment Nb_iter_kept <- MCMC_out_IMD$Nb_iter_kept N_iter_setpoint <- MCMC_out_IMD$N_iter_setpoint L_parameters <- unique(MCMC_out_IMD$Priors$Nom) ``` ::: We can retrieve different information from the model : - The number of chains used : 3 - The number of parameters : 6 - The number of experiments : 73 - The number of last iterations used to describe the posterior distribution : 10^{4} - The number of last iterations used to create the `tab_setpoint.out` file : 333 Warning : Run the command `./mcsim.m_TK_IMD TK_IMD_Setpoint.in` in the terminal while being in the folder `mod/TK_IMD` to create the `Setpoints.out` now. Do the same with `./mcsim.m_TK_IMD TK_IMD_Setpoint_ind.in` to create the `Setpoints_ind.out` and with `./mcsim.m_TK_IMD TK_IMD_Setpoint_ind_full.in` to create the `Setpoints_ind_full.out`. ### Priors used for the model ::: {.cell tbl-cap='Priors used for the model' tbl-label='tbl-IMDPriors'} ```{.r .cell-code} colnames(MCMC_out_IMD$Priors) <- c("Nom", "Distribution", "P1", "P2", "P3", "P4") MCMC_out_IMD$Priors |> datatable( options = list( dom = 't', autoWidth = TRUE, columnDefs = list( list(className = 'dt-left', targets = "_all") ) ), class="hover" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} #MCMC_out_IMD$Priors ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} n_samples <- 1e6 # Simulation of the distribution df_priors_dist <- MCMC_out_IMD$Priors |> dplyr::select(Nom, Distribution, P1, P2, P3, P4) |> rowwise() |> mutate(samples = case_when( Distribution == "Uniform" ~ list(runif(n_samples, min = P1, max = P2)), Distribution == "Normal" ~ list(rnorm(n_samples, mean = P1, sd = P2)), Distribution == "LogUniform" ~ list(exp(runif(n_samples, min = log(P1), max = log(P2)))), Distribution == "TruncNormal" ~ list(rtruncnorm(n_samples, a = P3, b = P4, mean = P1, sd = P2)) )) |> unnest(samples) |> filter(!(Nom %in% c("kuIMD", "keIMD") & samples > 0.05)) col_prior <- Nord_polar[4] alpha_prior <- 0.5 p_priors <- ggplot() + facet_wrap(~Nom, scales = "free")+ stat_halfeye( data = df_priors_dist, aes( x = samples ), alpha = alpha_prior, fill = col_prior, color = col_prior, normalize = "xy" ) + labs( title = "Priors distributions", x = "Parameter value", y = "Density" ) + theme_minimal() p_priors ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Distributions of the priors.](BA_TK_IMD_files/figure-html/fig-IMDprior-1.png){#fig-IMDprior width=768} ::: ::: ### Chains ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} p_chains <- ggplot( data = MCMC_out_IMD$Chains, aes( x = Iteration, y = value, color = as.factor(Chain), group = as.factor(Chain) ) )+ geom_line(alpha=0.7)+ scale_y_log10()+ facet_wrap(~Parameter, scales = "free", ncol = 2)+ scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", values = nord(palette = "frost"))+ theme_bw()+ theme( legend.position = "right", title=element_text(size=12, face="plain"), axis.title.x = element_text(face="plain"), strip.background = element_rect(fill="white") ) p_chains ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Parameters chains. Only the first iteration and the last `r Nb_iter_kept` are represented.](BA_TK_IMD_files/figure-html/fig-IMDchains-1.png){#fig-IMDchains width=768} ::: ::: We can also take a look at the likelihood and the deviance ratio. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} p1 <- ggplot( MCMC_out_IMD$df_LnPost_start, aes( x = iteration, y = LnPosterior, color = Chain ) ) + geom_line() + scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", label = c("1", "2", "3"), values = Nord_frost) + labs( x = "First half iterations", y = "LnPosterior" ) + theme_minimal() p2 <- ggplot( MCMC_out_IMD$df_LnPost, aes( x = iteration, y = LnPosterior, color = Chain ) ) + geom_line() + scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", label = c("1", "2", "3"), values = Nord_frost) + labs( x = paste(MCMC_out_IMD$Nb_iter_kept, "last iterations"), y = "LnPosterior" ) + theme_minimal() p3 <- ggplot( MCMC_out_IMD$df_Devc, aes( x = iteration, y = RatioDeviance, color = Chain ) ) + geom_line() + scale_color_manual(name = "Chains", label = c("1", "2", "3"), values = Nord_frost) + labs( x = paste(MCMC_out_IMD$Nb_iter_kept, "last iterations"), y = "Ratio Deviance" ) + theme_minimal() p_LL <- p1 + p2 + p3 + plot_layout(ncol=3, guides = "collect") p_LL ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Evolution of likelihood and deviance ratio through the iterations.](BA_TK_IMD_files/figure-html/fig-IMDlike-1.png){#fig-IMDlike width=768} ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # Large format per chain mcmc_list <- lapply(split(MCMC_out_IMD$Chains, MCMC_out_IMD$Chains$Chain), function(d) { wide <- d %>% dplyr::select(Iteration, Parameter, value) %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Parameter, values_from = value) %>% arrange(Iteration) mcmc(as.matrix(wide[,-1])) }) mcmc_list <- as.mcmc.list(mcmc_list) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} par(mfrow=c(1,3)) gelman.plot(mcmc_list, bin.width = 10, # Number of observations per segment, # first segment --> at least 50 iterations. max.bins = 50, # Maximum number of bins, excluding the last one confidence = 0.95, # Coverage probability of confidence interval. transform = FALSE, # improve the normality of the distribution autoburnin=TRUE) # Remove first half of sequence gelman <- gelman.diag(mcmc_list, confidence = 0.95, transform=FALSE, autoburnin=TRUE, multivariate=TRUE) print(gelman) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Potential scale reduction factors: Point est. Upper C.I. a_growth.1. 1.01 1.03 keIMD.1. 1.00 1.01 kuIMD.1. 1.00 1.01 Sigma_CiIMD.1. 1.00 1.00 Sigma_W.1. 1.03 1.10 Vr_a_growth.1. 1.03 1.11 Multivariate psrf 1.03 ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Chains convergence.](BA_TK_IMD_files/figure-html/fig-IMDchainsconvergence-1.png){#fig-IMDchainsconvergence width=768} ::: ::: Chains converged. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} mcmc_list_corr <- mcmc.list( lapply(mcmc_list, function(x) { mcmc(as.matrix(x)[-1, , drop = FALSE]) # <- reconvertir en mcmc }) ) colramp_aurora <- colorRampPalette(rev(Nord_aurora[1:4])) ipairs(as.matrix(mcmc_list_corr), colramp = colramp_aurora, pixs=0.25, cex.diag = 0.5) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Parameter correlations.](BA_TK_IMD_files/figure-html/fig-corr-1.png){#fig-corr width=576} ::: ::: ### Parameter estimation results ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} alpha_prior <- 0.5 alpha_post <- 0.5 col_prior <- Nord_snow[1] col_post <- col_IMD MCMC_out_IMD$Chains_plot <- MCMC_out_IMD$Chains |> mutate(Nom = str_remove(Parameter, "\\.\\d+\\.$")) |> filter(!(Nom == "kuIMD" & value > 10)) p_post <- ggplot() + # Priors stat_halfeye( data = df_priors_dist, aes( x = samples, #y = ..scaled.. ), alpha = alpha_prior, fill = col_prior, color = col_prior, normalize = "xy" ) + # Posterior stat_halfeye( data = subset(MCMC_out_IMD$Chains_plot, Nom %in% L_parameters), mapping = aes( x=value ), fill = col_post, color = col_post, alpha = alpha_post, normalize = "xy" ) + facet_wrap(~Nom, scales = "free")+ labs( title = "Posterior and prior distributions", x = "Parameter value", y = "Density" ) + theme_minimal()+ theme( title=element_markdown(face="bold") ) p_post ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Distributions of the priors and the posteriors.](BA_TK_IMD_files/figure-html/fig-IMDpost-1.png){#fig-IMDpost width=768} ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} MCMC_out_IMD$Chains <- MCMC_out_IMD$Chains |> mutate(Nom = str_remove(Parameter, "\\.\\d+\\.$")) f_get_mode <- function(x) { ux <- unique(x) ux[which.max(tabulate(match(x, ux)))] } ku_samples <- MCMC_out_IMD$Chains |> filter(Nom == "kuIMD") ke_samples <- MCMC_out_IMD$Chains |> filter(Nom == "keIMD") BCF_samples <- ku_samples$value / ke_samples$value BCF_mode <- f_get_mode(BCF_samples) BCF_CI <- quantile(BCF_samples, probs = c(0.025, 0.975)) BCF_CI_low <- as.numeric(BCF_CI[1]) BCF_CI_up <- as.numeric(BCF_CI[2]) BCF_min <- min(BCF_samples) BCF_max <- max(BCF_samples) BCF_mean <- mean(BCF_samples) BCF_sd <- sd(BCF_samples) BCF <- c( BCF_mode, BCF_CI_low, BCF_CI_up, BCF_min, BCF_max, BCF_mean, BCF_sd ) ``` ::: ::: {.cell tbl-cap='Results summary' tbl-label='tbl-IMDressum'} ```{.r .cell-code} Summary_res_IMD_tmp <- cbind(as.data.frame(MCMC_out_IMD$Summary_res)[1:length(L_parameters)], BCF) Summary_res_IMD_f <- Summary_res_IMD_tmp |> mutate(across(where(is.numeric), signif, 2)) Summary_res_IMD_f |> datatable( options = list( dom = 't', autoWidth = TRUE, columnDefs = list( list(className = 'dt-left', targets = "_all") ) ), class="hover" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} # Summary_res_IMD_f ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # BIC calculation LL <- f_get_mode(MCMC_out_IMD$df_LnData$LnData) n <- length(na.omit(df_TK_IMD$Weight)) + length(na.omit(df_TK_IMD$CiIMD)) k <- Nb_param -2 BIC <- -2*LL + k*log(n) cat("Number of observations, n = ", n,"\nNumber of parameters, k = ", k, "\nLog-likelihood, LL = ", LL, "\nBIC = ", BIC) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Number of observations, n = 362 Number of parameters, k = 4 Log-likelihood, LL = -305.9573 BIC = 635.4812 ``` ::: ::: ### Comparison of observed vs. predicted data Creation of the `.in` files that will enable the obtention of the prediction of the model for all of our data points : ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} Molecule <- "IMD" l_param_name <- "kuIMD, keIMD, a_growth" f_Setpoint_ind(path_mod_IMD,Molecule, l_param_name) ``` ::: ::: {.cell execute='false'} ```{.bash .cell-code} pwd cd .. cd .. cd mod/TK_IMD pwd for j in $(seq 1 73); do ./mcsim.m_TK_IMD TK_IMD_Setpoint_ind_${j}.in done ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} dObs_ind <- df_TK_IMD |> mutate( ID = as.numeric(ID), Group_tmp = case_when( ID < 65 ~ "Uptake", (ID > 64 & ID <= 128) ~ "Elimination", ID > 128 ~ "Uptake bis"), Group = fct_relevel(Group_tmp, c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Uptake bis")) ) colnames(dObs_ind)[colnames(dObs_ind) == "Weight"] <- "Weight_obs" colnames(dObs_ind)[colnames(dObs_ind) == "CiIMD"] <- "CiIMD_obs" colnames(dObs_ind)[colnames(dObs_ind) == "t"] <- "Times" col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[1], Nord_frost[2]) Sim.Res.ind <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment, function(j) { read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_IMD, paste0("Setpoints_ind_", j, ".out"))) %>% mutate(sim = j) }) %>% bind_rows() df_mod_ind <- NULL for (i in 1:Nb_experiment){ ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i] Sim.Res.ind_i <- subset(Sim.Res.ind, sim == i) |> dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x)))) dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i) Time_pred = dObs_i$Time # !!! Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiIMD") Nsortie = 2 MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){ index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind_i), fixed=FALSE) Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind_i[ , index] ) MPV = c( MPV, as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) ) IC_min = c(IC_min, apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile, 0.025, na.rm=TRUE) ) IC_max = c(IC_max, apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile, 0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim))) } df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame( predict.endpoint = MPV, Time = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie), low = IC_min, up = IC_max, Endpt = Endpoint ) df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>% mutate(ID=ID_i) df_mod_ind <- rbind(df_mod_ind, df_mod_ind_i) } df_mod_Weight_ind <- subset(df_mod_ind, Endpt == "Weight" & Time !=0) df_mod_CiIMD_ind <- subset(df_mod_ind, Endpt == "CiIMD" & Time !=0) df_predobs_CiIMD_ind <- dObs_ind |> filter(Time !=0) |> left_join(df_mod_CiIMD_ind, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred")) |> dplyr::select(-c(Weight_obs, CiEPX)) |> mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> drop_na() df_predobs_Weight_ind <- dObs_ind |> filter(Time !=0) |> left_join(df_mod_Weight_ind, suffix = c("_obs", "_pred"))|> dplyr::select(-c(CiIMD_obs, CiEPX)) |> mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> drop_na() ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} RMSE <- sqrt(mean((c(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind$CiIMD_obs, df_predobs_Weight_ind$Weight_obs) - c(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind$predict.endpoint, df_predobs_Weight_ind$predict.endpoint))^2, na.rm = TRUE)) cat("RMSE = ", RMSE) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` RMSE = 181.0694 ``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} fact_1 <- 2 fact_2 <- 5 col_line0 <- Nord_polar[1] col_line1 <- Nord_polar[4] col_line2 <- Nord_snow[1] col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[1], Nord_frost[2]) seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1.5, 0.001) df_line <- data.frame( x1 = seq_line, y1 = seq_line*fact_1, x_1 = seq_line, y_1 = seq_line/fact_1, x2 = seq_line, y2 = seq_line*fact_2, x_2 = seq_line, y_2 = seq_line/fact_2 ) p_W <- ggplot( data = df_predobs_Weight_ind, mapping = aes( x = Weight_obs, y = predict.endpoint ) )+ geom_line( data=df_line, mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1), color = col_line1 )+ geom_line( data=df_line, mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1), color = col_line1 )+ geom_line( data=df_line, mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2), color = col_line2 )+ geom_line( data=df_line, mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2), color = col_line2 )+ geom_abline( slope=1, intercept = 0, color = col_line0, linewidth = 1 )+ geom_pointrange( mapping = aes( ymin = low, ymax = up ), alpha = 0.5, color = col_IMD )+ xlim( xmin = 0.5, xmax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind$Weight_obs) )+ ylim( ymin = 0.5, ymax = max(df_predobs_Weight_ind$predict.endpoint) )+ scale_x_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+ scale_y_log10(limits=c(0.5, 1.2))+ labs( x = "Observed weight of earthworms (g)", y = "Predicted weight of earthworms (g)" )+ theme_minimal() fact_1 <- 2 fact_2 <- 5 seq_line <- seq(0.5, 1500, 0.01) df_line <- data.frame( x1 = seq_line, y1 = seq_line*fact_1, x_1 = seq_line, y_1 = seq_line/fact_1, x2 = seq_line, y2 = seq_line*fact_2, x_2 = seq_line, y_2 = seq_line/fact_2 ) lim_plot <- 3000 col_exposure_bis <- c(Nord_aurora[1], Nord_aurora[4], Nord_aurora[2]) shape_exposure_bis <- c(shape_IMD, shape_IMD, shape_EPX) p_CiIMD_predobs <- ggplot( data = df_predobs_CiIMD_ind, mapping = aes( x = CiIMD_obs, y = predict.endpoint ) )+ geom_path( data=df_line, mapping=aes(x=x1, y=y1), color = col_line1 )+ geom_line( data=df_line, mapping=aes(x=x_1, y=y_1), color = col_line1 )+ geom_line( data=df_line, mapping=aes(x=x2, y=y2), color = col_line2 )+ geom_line( data=df_line, mapping=aes(x=x_2, y=y_2), color = col_line2 )+ geom_abline( slope=1, intercept = 0, color = col_line0, linewidth = 1 )+ geom_pointrange( mapping = aes( ymin = low, ymax = up, color = Group, shape = Group ), alpha = 0.5#, #color = col_IMD )+ xlim( xmin = 0.5, xmax = max(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind$CiIMD_obs) )+ ylim( ymin = 0.5, ymax = max(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind$predict.endpoint) )+ labs( x = "Observed concentrations of IMD\nin earthworms (ng/g)", y = "Predicted concentrations of IMD\nin earthworms (ng/g)" )+ scale_color_manual( values = col_exposure_bis )+ scale_shape_manual(values = shape_exposure_bis)+ scale_x_log10( limits=c(100, lim_plot) )+ scale_y_log10( limits=c(100, lim_plot) )+ theme_minimal() p_predobs <- p_W + p_CiIMD_predobs p_predobs ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Results of the model fit on experimental data. Predicted values are represented with points with their respective credibility interval of 95%. Thin black and grey lines represent the 2-folds and 5-fold changes, respectively. The thicker black line represents the identity line.](BA_TK_IMD_files/figure-html/fig-IMDpredobs-1.png){#fig-IMDpredobs width=768} ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} df_predobs_Weight_ind <- df_predobs_Weight_ind |> mutate( Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / Weight_obs, Residuals = predict.endpoint - Weight_obs ) Weight_count_fold2 <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind$Weight_obs) * 100 Weight_count_fold5 <- length(subset(df_predobs_Weight_ind, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$Weight_obs) / length(df_predobs_Weight_ind$Weight_obs) * 100 df_predobs_CiIMD_ind <- df_predobs_CiIMD_ind |> mutate( Ratio_predobs = predict.endpoint / CiIMD_obs, Residuals = predict.endpoint - CiIMD_obs ) CiIMD_count_fold2 <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind, Ratio_predobs >= 0.5 & Ratio_predobs <= 2)$CiIMD_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind$CiIMD_obs) * 100 CiIMD_count_fold5 <- length(subset(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind, Ratio_predobs >= 0.2 & Ratio_predobs <= 5)$CiIMD_obs) / length(df_predobs_CiIMD_ind$CiIMD_obs) * 100 cat( "For weights : \n\n", "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(Weight_count_fold2, 1), "%\n", "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(Weight_count_fold5, 1), "%" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` For weights : Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = 100 % Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = 100 % ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} cat( "\n\nFor internal concentrations : \n\n", "Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = ", round(CiIMD_count_fold2, 1), "%\n", "Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = ", round(CiIMD_count_fold5, 1), "%" ) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` For internal concentrations : Percentage of prediction in fold 2 = 90.4 % Percentage of prediction in fold 5 = 99.3 % ``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} df_residuals_CiIMD <- df_predobs_CiIMD_ind |> mutate( Residual = predict.endpoint - CiIMD_obs, Ratio_Residual = predict.endpoint/CiIMD_obs ) |> mutate( Time_point = as.numeric(as.character(Time_point_f)), Group = factor(Group, c("Uptake", "Elimination", "TK_BIS")), Time_relative = case_when( Group == "Uptake" ~ Time_point, Group == "TK_BIS" ~ Time_point, Group == "Elimination" ~ Time_point - 21 ) ) p_residus <- ggplot(df_residuals_CiIMD)+ geom_point( aes( x = Time_point, y = Ratio_Residual, color = Group ), alpha=0.7 )+ labs( x = "Time point (days)", y = "Predicted/observed ratio" )+ scale_color_manual( values = col_exposure )+ scale_x_continuous( breaks = unique(df_residuals_CiIMD$Time_point) )+ scale_y_log10()+ theme_minimal() p_residus ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Residuals](BA_TK_IMD_files/figure-html/fig-IMDresiduals-1.png){#fig-IMDresiduals width=768} ::: ::: ### Full individual trajectories Creation of the `.in` files that will enable the obtention of the prediction of the full $C_i^{EPX}$ trajectories for each individual : ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} Time_min <- 0 Time_max <- 44 Time_step <- 0.25 Time_pred <- seq(Time_min, Time_max, Time_step) print_times <- paste(Time_min, Time_max, Time_step, sep=", ") Molecule <- "IMD" f_Setpoint_ind_full(path_mod_IMD,Molecule, print_times, l_param_name) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.bash .cell-code} pwd cd .. cd .. cd mod/TK_IMD pwd for j in $(seq 1 73); do ./mcsim.m_TK_IMD TK_IMD_Setpoint_ind_full_${j}.in done ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} ##| cache: false dObs_ind <- df_TK_IMD |> mutate(ID = as.numeric(ID)) colnames(dObs_ind)[colnames(dObs_ind) == "Weight"] <- "Weight_obs" colnames(dObs_ind)[colnames(dObs_ind) == "CiIMD"] <- "CiIMD_obs" colnames(dObs_ind)[colnames(dObs_ind) == "t"] <- "Times" nb_rows_ind <- NC*N_iter_setpoint+1 Sim.Res.ind.full <- lapply(1:Nb_experiment, function(j) { read_tsv(file.path(path_mod_IMD, paste0("Setpoints_ind_full_", j, ".out"))) %>% mutate(sim = j) }) %>% bind_rows() df_mod_ind <- NULL for (i in 1:Nb_experiment){ ID_i <- unique(dObs_ind$ID)[i] Sim.Res.ind.full_i <- subset(Sim.Res.ind.full, sim == i) |> dplyr::select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x)))) dObs_i <- subset(dObs_ind, ID == ID_i) Nom_Endpoints = c("Weight", "CiIMD", "C_exposure") Nsortie = length(Nom_Endpoints) MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL for (j in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){ index =grep(paste0("^",Nom_Endpoints[j],"_") , colnames(Sim.Res.ind.full_i), fixed=FALSE) Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res.ind.full_i[ , index] ) MPV = c( MPV, as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) ) IC_min = c(IC_min, apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile, 0.025, na.rm=TRUE) ) IC_max = c(IC_max, apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile, 0.975, na.rm=TRUE) ) Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[j], ncol(Data_sim))) } df_mod_ind_i <- data.frame( predict.endpoint = MPV, Time = rep(Time_pred, Nsortie), low = IC_min, up = IC_max, Endpt = Endpoint ) df_mod_ind_i <- df_mod_ind_i %>% mutate(ID=ID_i) df_mod_ind <- rbind(df_mod_ind, df_mod_ind_i) } df_mod_Weight_ind <- subset(df_mod_ind, Endpt == "Weight") df_mod_CiIMD_ind <- subset(df_mod_ind, Endpt == "CiIMD") df_mod_CeIMD_ind <- subset(df_mod_ind, Endpt == "C_exposure") time_limits <- dObs_ind %>% group_by(ID) %>% summarise(time_cutoff = max(Time, na.rm = TRUE) + 5) Time_points_Nb_rep <- dObs_ind |> dplyr::select(ID, Time_point_f, Nb_rep) df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t <- df_mod_CiIMD_ind %>% left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>% filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>% dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID") df_mod_Weight_ind_t <- df_mod_Weight_ind %>% left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>% filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>% dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID") df_mod_CeIMD_ind_t <- df_mod_CeIMD_ind %>% left_join(time_limits, by = "ID") %>% filter(Time <= time_cutoff) %>% dplyr::select(-time_cutoff) |> left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID") y_segment <- 2000 df_phases <- dObs_ind |> arrange(ID, Time) |> group_by(ID) |> mutate( row = row_number(), t_start = Time, t_end = lead(Time), segment = row, y = y_segment ) |> filter(!is.na(t_end)) |> dplyr::select(ID, segment, t_start, t_end, y, Experiment) |> ungroup() |> mutate( Phase = case_when( (segment == 1 & ID < 65) ~ 1, (segment == 2 & ID < 65) ~ 3, (segment == 1 & ID > 64) ~ 1, (segment == 2 & ID > 64) ~ 2, (segment == 3 & ID > 64) ~ 3, (Experiment == "TKBIS" & segment == 1)~1, (Experiment == "TKBIS" & segment == 2)~3 ) ) ``` ::: ::: panel-tabset ## Internal concentrations - Normal scale ::: {.cell fig-label='fig-IMDdatapredfull'} ```{.r .cell-code} library(ggforce) # ID_tri <- c(1, 9, 17, 25, 33, 41, 49, 57, 65, 73, 81, 89, 97, 107, 115, 123)+4 ID_tri <- unique(df_TK_IMD$ID) dObs_ind_plot <- dObs_ind |> mutate(across(everything(), ~replace(.x, .x == -1, NA))) |> drop_na() |> filter(ID %in% ID_tri)|> mutate( No_rep = paste0("No ", Nb_rep), Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))), Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"), Time_point_days = fct_reorder(Time_point_days, as.numeric(Time_point)) ) df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot <- subset(df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t, ID %in% ID_tri) |> mutate( No_rep = paste0("No ", Nb_rep), Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))), Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"), Time_point_days = fct_reorder(Time_point_days, as.numeric(Time_point)) ) df_mod_CeIMD_ind_t_plot <- subset(df_mod_CeIMD_ind_t, ID %in% ID_tri) df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot <- subset(df_mod_Weight_ind_t, ID %in% ID_tri) |> mutate( No_rep = paste0("No ", Nb_rep), Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))), Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"), Time_point_days = fct_reorder(Time_point_days, as.numeric(Time_point)) ) df_phases_plot <- subset(df_phases, ID %in% ID_tri)|> left_join(Time_points_Nb_rep, by="ID") |> mutate( No_rep = paste0("No ", Nb_rep), Time_point = as.numeric(gsub("([0-9]+).*", "\\1" , as.character(Time_point_f))), Time_point_days = paste0(Time_point_f, " days"), Time_point_days = fct_reorder(Time_point_days, as.numeric(Time_point)) ) alpha_point <- 0.5 col_exposure <- c(Nord_aurora[2], Nord_aurora[3], Nord_aurora[4]) p_CiIMD_traj <- ggplot()+ geom_segment( data = df_phases_plot, aes( x = t_start, xend = t_end, y = y, yend = y, group = ID, color = factor(Phase) ), linewidth = 2, alpha = 0.7 ) + geom_line( data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot, aes( x=Time, y= low, group = ID ), linetype="dotted", color = col_IMD )+ geom_line( data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot, aes( x=Time, y= up, group = ID ), linetype="dotted", color = col_IMD )+ geom_line( data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot, aes( x=Time, y= predict.endpoint, group = ID ), color = col_IMD, lwd=1 )+ geom_ribbon( data=df_mod_CiIMD_ind_t_plot, aes( x=Time, ymax= up, ymin= low, group = ID ), fill = col_IMD, alpha=0.1 )+ geom_point( data = dObs_ind_plot, aes( x = Time, y = CiIMD_obs ), size = 2, alpha = 0.7, color = col_red )+ # facet_wrap( # ~ID, # ncol=4, # #scales = "free_x" # )+ facet_grid( vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#, )+ scale_color_manual( values = col_exposure, label = c("Uptake", "Elimination", "Depuration"), name = "Phase" )+ labs( x = "Time (days)", y = "CiIMD (ng/g)" )+ #lims(y=c(0, 300))+ theme_minimal() p_CiIMD_traj ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Estimated toxicokinetic of the IMD concentration in earthworms exposed to 100 ng/g of IMD. Red points represent the experimental data, the blue curve represent the estimated toxicokinetic curve and the transparent blue band correspond to the credibility interval of the model.](BA_TK_IMD_files/figure-html/IMDpredcurvesdata-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: ## Internal concentrations - Log-scale ::: {.cell fig-label='fig-IMDdatapredfulllog'} ```{.r .cell-code} p_CiIMD_traj_log <- p_CiIMD_traj + scale_y_log10() p_CiIMD_traj_log ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Estimated toxicokinetic of the IMD concentration in earthworms exposed to 100 ng/g of IMD. Red points represent the experimental data, the blue curve represent the estimated toxicokinetic curve and the transparent blue band correspond to the credibility interval of the model.](BA_TK_IMD_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-12-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: ## Weights ::: {.cell fig-label='fig-IMDdatapredfullW'} ```{.r .cell-code} alpha_point <- 0.5 p_W <- ggplot()+ geom_line( data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot, aes( x=Time, y= low, group = ID ), linetype="dotted", color = col_IMD )+ geom_line( data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot, aes( x=Time, y= up, group = ID ), linetype="dotted", color = col_IMD )+ geom_line( data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot, aes( x=Time, y= predict.endpoint, group = ID ), color = col_IMD, lwd=1 )+ geom_ribbon( data=df_mod_Weight_ind_t_plot, aes( x=Time, ymax= up, ymin= low, group = ID ), fill = col_IMD, alpha=0.1 )+ geom_point( data = dObs_ind_plot, aes( x = Time, y = Weight_obs ), size = 2, alpha = 0.7, color = col_red )+ facet_grid( vars(Time_point_days), vars(No_rep)#, )+ #lims(y=c(0, 1500))+ labs( x = "Time (days)", y = "Weight (g)" )+ theme_minimal() p_W ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Weight predictions](BA_TK_IMD_files/figure-html/IMDpredcurvesdataW-1.png){width=768} ::: ::: ::: ### Simulation of the toxicodynamic in earthworms throughout the exposition The goal here is to recreate the concentration dynamic in the average earthworm during our exposition scheme but without the fasting phase that was required for chemical analysis and during which elimination was happening. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} l_param_name_tot <- "kuIMD, keIMD, a_growth, Vr_a_growth, Sigma_W, Sigma_CiIMD" Time_min <- 0 Time_max <- 42 Time_step <- 0.25 Time_pred <- seq(Time_min, Time_max, Time_step) print_times <- paste(Time_min, Time_max, Time_step, sep=", ") f_Setpoint(path_mod_IMD, Molecule, print_times, l_param_name_tot) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.bash .cell-code} pwd cd .. cd .. cd mod/TK_IMD pwd ./mcsim.m_TK_IMD TK_IMD_Setpoint.in wait ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} Sim.Res <- as.data.frame(fread(here::here(path_mod_IMD, "Setpoints.out"),sep="\t")) Nom_Endpoints =c("Weight_1", "CiIMD_1", "C_exposure_1") Nsortie = 3 MPV = IC_min = IC_max = Endpoint = index = NULL for (i in 1:length(Nom_Endpoints)){ index =grep(paste("^",Nom_Endpoints[i],"\\.", sep="") , colnames(Sim.Res), fixed=FALSE ) Data_sim = as.matrix( Sim.Res[ , index] ) MPV = c( MPV, as.numeric( Data_sim[nrow(Data_sim), ] ) ) IC_min = c(IC_min, apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile, 0.025) ) IC_max = c(IC_max, apply(Data_sim, 2, quantile, 0.975) ) Endpoint = c(Endpoint, rep(Nom_Endpoints[i], ncol(Data_sim))) } df_mod <- data.frame( predict.endpoint = MPV, Time = c( rep(Time_pred, Nsortie)), low = IC_min, up = IC_max, Endpt = Endpoint, Experiment = c(rep(rep("Experience 1", length(Time_pred)), Nsortie)) ) df_mod_Weight <- subset(df_mod, Endpt == "Weight_1") df_mod_CiIMD <- subset(df_mod, Endpt == "CiIMD_1") # length(MPV) # length(df_Cin$Time) # length(Endpoint) # length(df_Cin$Experiment) ``` ::: ::: {.cell fig-label='fig-IMDcurvemod'} ```{.r .cell-code} alpha_point <- 0.5 p_CiIMD <- ggplot()+ geom_line( data=df_mod_CiIMD, aes( x=Time, y= low ), linetype="dotted", color = col_IMD )+ geom_line( data=df_mod_CiIMD, aes( x=Time, y= up ), linetype="dotted", color = col_IMD )+ geom_line( data=df_mod_CiIMD, aes( x=Time, y= predict.endpoint ), color = col_IMD, lwd=1 )+ geom_ribbon( data=df_mod_CiIMD, aes( x=Time, ymax= up, ymin= low ), fill = col_IMD, alpha=0.1 )+ labs( x = "Time (days)", y = "Internal IMD concentration (ng/g)" )+ theme_minimal() p <- p_CiIMD p ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Estimated toxicokinetic of the IMD concentration in earthworms exposed to 0.1 mg/kg of IMD. Blue points represent the experimental data, the blue curve represents the estimated toxicokinetic curve and the transparent blue band corresponds to the credibility interval of the model.](BA_TK_IMD_files/figure-html/IMDpredcurves-1.png){width=768} ::: :::
